𝖈𝖔𝖓𝖙𝖊𝖓𝖙 𝖜𝖆𝖗𝖓𝖎𝖓𝖌 — unequal power dynamics, university professor x student relationship, established relationship
Professor Mullen's class was notorious for being difficult to pass with a high drop out rate, but you, a bright student studying classical literature and philosophy under him, are considered to have a lot of potential. His favourite student, in fact, which is a tall order in and of itself.

It just so happens that your extra curricular activity involves screwing said hardass professor.


A/N: Trying out a new way of formatting that is (slightly) less token heavy please let me know how y'all feel about it. Big thank you to @MilkBreadBby for the layout idea.

A/N 2: Yeah, this is me trying out pure smut again since like Norman. More to come probably, lol.

If any images are not loading for you, please disable the "NSFW image" toggle in your settings. That's kinda bugging out any images in descriptions right now.
